cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~grew_up_health_conscious(taylor)).

    ~disregards_physical_wellbeing(taylor)).

    ~grew_up_health_conscious(X0) | eats_salads_regularly(X0)).

    ~eats_salads_regularly(X0) | health_conscious(X0)).

    ~disregards_physical_wellbeing(X0) | ~health_conscious(X0)).
